creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Why should you fetch it, when you can't install it anyway?
The system is saving you the hassle!

If you think you know what you're doing, try make fetch NO_IGNORE=1

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

As to floating eyes, let them float :).
  - r.g.r.a
